title: Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace
summary: Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace, its resources and its assets. Explore which developer tools you can use to interact with the workspace, focusing on the CLI and Python SDK v2.

sections.title: Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace
sections.summary: Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace, its resources and its assets. Explore which developer tools you can use to interact with the workspace, focusing on the CLI and Python SDK v2.

lessons.title: Explore Azure Machine Learning workspace resources and assets
lessons.content_md:
As a data scientist, you can use Azure Machine Learning to train and manage your machine learning models. Learn what Azure Machine Learning is, and get familiar with all its resources and assets.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-azure-machine-learning-workspace-resources-assets/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore Azure Machine Learning workspace resources and assets

lessons.title: Explore developer tools for workspace interaction
lessons.content_md:
Learn how you can interact with the Azure Machine Learning workspace. You can use the Azure Machine Learning studio, the Python SDK (v2), or the Azure CLI (v2).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-developer-tools-for-workspace-interaction/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore developer tools for workspace interaction

lessons.title: Make data available in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn about how to connect to data from the Azure Machine Learning workspace. You're introduced to datastores and data assets.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/make-data-available-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Make data available in Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Work with compute targets in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to work with compute targets in Azure Machine Learning. Compute targets allow you to run your machine learning workloads. Explore how and when you can use a compute instance or compute cluster.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-compute-resources-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Work with compute targets in Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Work with environments in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Machine Learning Python SDK v2 to work with environments

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-environments-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Work with environments in Azure Machine Learning

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Explore and configure the Azure Machine Learning workspace**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
